name: Close CRM
description: Monitor Close CRM for sales team access and customer data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Close at https://app.close.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys → Create API Key
3. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with colon): echo -n 'apikey:' | base64
4. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with trailing colon). Found in Close Settings → API Keys. Command: echo -n 'apikey:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Close CRM users with access to sales data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Close CRM platform is operational
